description: Attacker conducts a brute force attack (failed logins), logs in successfully from a new device/IP, disables MFA or updates email/phone, and executes a high-value money transfer.
Session token stolen or hijacked. User logs in from location A, and within an impossible travel window, accesses account from location B without credential re-entry.
Attacker compromises credentials, immediately changes password/email, and registers a new MFA device, locking out the legitimate user.
